metadata.title: Consumer Protection (Consumer Disputes Redressal Commissions) Amendment Rules, 2022

text:
1.      (1) These rules may be called the Consumer Protection (Consumer Disputes Redressal Commissions)
Amendment Rules, 2022.
(2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette.

heading: 2. In the Consumer Protection (Consumer Disputes Redressal Commissions) Rules, 2020, in rule 7, in sub-rule (2), for the Table, the following Table shall be substituted, namely:- “TABLE Sl. No. Value of goods or services paid as consideration

text:

[F. No. J-10/6/2018-CPU(Pt.1)]
ANUPAM MISHRA, Jt. Secy.

Note :   The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3,
Sub-section (i) vide number G.S.R. 448(E), dated the 15th July, 2020.
